headline: Blackstone Eyes Stroer Deal As European Media Role Expands
summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) is reportedly partnering with I Squared Capital to pursue the core advertising business of German media company Stroer. The potential transaction would extend Blackstone’s presence in European media beyond its recent focus on data centers and aircraft leasing. This move would add exposure to outdoor and digital advertising assets tied to European consumer and business advertising budgets. For you as an investor following NYSE:BX, this reported Stroer interest points to...

headline: Why Is Blackstone (BX) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of alternative investment manager Blackstone (NYSE:BX) jumped 5.2% in the afternoon session after analyst sentiment improved as Oppenheimer upgraded the company's stock to "Outperform."
